bead.title: Story 16.3: Specs + cross-cutting e2e + raw-transcript-viewed audit even: part 2
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Parent bead ddx-b4c5151a is too broad for one execution pass. This child owns part 2 of 2 of that parent scope.

ROOT CAUSE
PROBLEM
Parent bead ddx-70a432b5 is too broad for one execution pass. This child owns part 3 of 3 of that parent scope.

ROOT CAUSE
PROBLEM
FEAT-008, FEAT-010, and FEAT-019 specs are missing the documentation sections required to make the Story-16 run-detail page and its evidence browser official. Without spec updates, the run-detail page, trust boundary statement, and raw-transcript audit event are undocumented platform behaviors.

ROOT CAUSE
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-008-*.md: missing a Run-detail-page subsection describing the trust boundary ('Anyone with project read access sees raw prompts, responses, stderr, tool args') and evidence browser whitelist (allowed extensions + 64KB cap).
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-010-*.md: Run resolver contract does not include prompt, response, stderr, toolCalls(first, after), bundleFiles[], bundleFile(path) with bundle-root confinement, or normalized ToolCallEntry.
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-019-*.md: review surface does not point to /runs/[runId] deep page.
- No 'raw transcript viewed' audit event exists in the server or schema.
- Depends on ddx-f04faa86 (16.1 page) and ddx-4cd64068 (16.2 evidence tab).

PROPOSED FIX
- Update FEAT-008: add Run-detail-page subsection with trust-boundary statement + evidence whitelist (*.txt, *.md, manifest.json, prompt.md, result.json, files < 64KB; no Markdown rendering in evidence tab).
- Update FEAT-010: extend Run resolver contract with prompt, response, stderr, toolCalls(first, after), bundleFiles[], bundleFile(path) with bundle-root confinement; document normalized ToolCallEntry as canonical store populated at drain.
- Update FEAT-019: review surface section updated to link to /runs/[runId] deep page.
- Add 'raw transcript viewed' audit event in server (emitted on prompt/response/transcript access).
- Add cross-cutting e2e: full prompt/response/tool-trace/evidence-list end-to-end via Playwright.

NON-SCOPE
- Frontend implementation (that is Story 16.1 and 16.2).
- New auth or role-based access control beyond what the trust boundary statement documents.

PROPOSED FIX
Implement only this child acceptance slice:
- p95 dataset (200 tool calls, 30 evidence files) all tabs render and become interactive within one render frame.
- bun run test:e2e green.
- lefthook run pre-commit passes.

NON-SCOPE
Do not implement parent acceptance criteria assigned to sibling
...[truncated]

PROPOSED FIX
Implement only this child acceptance slice:
- lefthook run pre-commit passes.
- cd cli && go test ./... passes.

NON-SCOPE
Do not implement parent acceptance criteria assigned to sibling child beads. Preserve every parent non-scope constraint unless this child explicitly narrows it.
bead.acceptance:
1. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
2. cd cli && go test ./... passes.

events.body: {"ac_map":[{"parent_ac":"Update FEAT-008: add Run-detail-page subsection with trust-boundary statement + evidence whitelist (*.txt, *.md, manifest.json, prompt.md, result.json, files \u003c 64KB; no Markdown rendering in evidence tab).","coverage":"Child 1 AC1-AC2"},{"parent_ac":"Update FEAT-010: extend Run resolver contract with prompt, response, stderr, toolCalls(first, after), bundleFiles[], bundleFile(path) with bundle-root confinement; document normalized ToolCallEntry as canonical store populated at drain.","coverage":"Child 1 AC2 and Child 2 AC1-AC5"},{"parent_ac":"Update FEAT-019: review surface section updated to link to /runs/[runId] deep page.","coverage":"Child 1 AC2"},{"parent_ac":"Add 'raw transcript viewed' audit event in server (emitted on prompt/response/transcript access).","coverage":"Child 3 AC1-AC5"},{"parent_ac":"Add cross-cutting e2e: full prompt/response/tool-trace/evidence-list end-to-end via Playwright.","coverage":"Child 4 AC1 and AC5"},{"parent_ac":"p95 dataset (200 tool calls, 30 evidence files) all tabs render and become interactive within one render frame.","coverage":"Child 4 AC2-AC4"},{"parent_ac":"bun run test:e2e green.","coverage":"Child 4 AC5"},{"parent_ac":"lefthook run pre-commit passes.","coverage":"Child 1 AC5; Child 2 AC6; Child 3 AC6; Child 4 AC7"},{"parent_ac":"cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./... passes.","coverage":"Child 1 AC4; Child 2 AC5; Child 3 AC5; Child 4 AC6"}],"child_ids":["ddx-b383c323","ddx-7c256284","ddx-ddeec4f1","ddx-f07cb5d3"],"rationale":"Split by independently executable ownership boundary: governing docs, backend resolver/data confinement, audit-event emission, and cross-cutting e2e/performance coverage. Each child preserves the parent non-scope constraints, keeps ddx-f04faa86 and ddx-4cd64068 as dependency IDs in the body, cites concrete file:line roots, and carries named Test* symbols plus go test and lefthook gates."}
events.summary: decomposed into ddx-b383c323, ddx-7c256284, ddx-ddeec4f1, ddx-f07cb5d3

events.body: {"rationale":"The bead only clearly satisfies explicit parent/dependency metadata; it is a decomposed/truncated prompt with duplicated parent context, non-imperative multi-scope title, missing file:line root cause, weak labels, and acceptance criteria that are only broad gates with no named tests or wired assertions.","score":1,"suggested_fixes":["Rewrite the title as an imperative one-line scope that names the specific subsystem and change, and fix the 'audit even' typo.","Replace the duplicated/truncated description with one standalone PROBLEM, ROOT CAUSE/CURRENT STATE, PROPOSED FIX, and NON-SCOPE set for this child only.","Ground root cause/current state in specific durable files and line numbers, including the server/schema location for the raw-transcript-viewed audit event.","Narrow the scope or split docs, audit-event implementation, and cross-cutting e2e/performance work into separate beads if they are independently executable.","Replace acceptance criteria with numbered criteria naming specific Test* symbols or unique go test -run filters for the spec/audit/e2e assertions.","Add an explicit wired assertion for prompt/response/transcript access emitting the raw-transcript-viewed audit event and for the cross-cutting e2e path.","Use package-specific verification, for example cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./\u003cpkg\u003e/... with relevant -run filters, plus lefthook run pre-commit.","Add required labels for area, kind, and cross-reference facets; do not rely only on phase/story/ac-quality/decomposed labels."],"waivers_applied":[]}
